name: tabs
label: Tabs
description: A segmented tab control for switching between panels of content. Compose with <x-tabs.list>, <x-tabs.tab> and <x-tabs.panel>.
example:
<x-tabs>
    <x-tabs.list>
        <x-tabs.tab tab="account">Account</x-tabs.tab>
        <x-tabs.tab tab="password">Password</x-tabs.tab>
    </x-tabs.list>
    <x-tabs.panel tab="account">Account settings</x-tabs.panel>
    <x-tabs.panel tab="password">Password settings</x-tabs.panel>
</x-tabs>

props.name: default
props.description: The tab key to select initially. Defaults to the first tab.

usage: Match each <x-tabs.tab tab="key"> to an <x-tabs.panel tab="key">. The first tab is selected automatically.
